transcript:
CALLER: Haan, mujhe puchhna tha ki aapke yahan GST lagta hai consultations pe?
AGENT: Ji, medical consultations pe generally GST applicable nahi hota hai. Lekin kuch diagnostic tests aur non-medical services pe GST lag sakta hai. Aapke specific case ke baare mein billing counter pe confirm kar sakte hain.
CALLER: Matlab doctor ki fees pe nahi lagega?
AGENT: Bilkul sahi. Doctor consultation fees GST-exempt hoti hain India mein healthcare regulations ke anusaar.
CALLER: Aur agar mujhe GST invoice chahiye kisi aur cheez ke liye?
AGENT: Haan, humara billing department GST-compliant invoices deta hai jahan applicable ho. Bas billing counter pe request karna hoga visit ke time.
CALLER: Perfect. Shukriya.
